title: Lab: Build and Measure an Informational Orbit
summary: Lab: Build and Measure an Informational Orbit retrieves prior skills in an original independent keyframe composition performance and preference build scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css transitions, css keyframes, css animation timing, css animation performance, css reduced motion, css animation debug in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real independent keyframe composition performance and preference build artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

options.text: Independent keyframe composition performance and preference build case 1: animate width height margin color and every future property to make state changes feel consistent.

Independent keyframe composition performance and preference build case 1: name the exact state change and properties, keep both endpoints understandable, and verify interruption, keyboard, preference, and performance behavior.
Independent keyframe composition performance and preference build case 1: delay button activation until its hover transition finishes so users see the complete effect.

options.text: Independent keyframe composition performance and preference build case 12: an animation transform always combines automatically with a transform declared elsewhere.

options.text: Independent keyframe composition performance and preference build case 17: a very fast animation automatically satisfies reduced-motion needs.
